title: thymus rigidulus
intro: Thymus rigidulus, also known as the rigid thyme, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Thymus rigidulus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Thymus rigidulus can be prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or infused oil, and is often used to treat various health issues, such as colds and respiratory problems.
